items.title: GSK's Q3 Earnings & Sales Beat Estimates, Stock Up on Raised '25 View
items.description: GSK's Q3 earnings and revenue beat expectations, powered by HIV and oncology growth, prompting the company to lift its 2025 outlook.

items.title: Johnson & Johnson announces first head-to-head study comparing IMAAVY™ with an alternative FcRn blocker in generalized myasthenia gravis (gMG) at AANEM Annual Meeting
items.description: Johnson & Johnson (NYSE: JNJ) today announced plans to initiate the first head-to-head study comparing FcRn blockers for patients with generalized myasthenia gravis (gMG), which aims to affirm IMAAVY™ (nipocalimab-aahu) as the FcRn blocker of choice for appropriate gMG patients. The EPIC study design and Vibrance-MG Phase 2/3 long-term extension (LTE) data are among 38 abstracts the Company will present at the 2025 Myasthenia Gravis Foundation of America (MGFA) Scientific Session and the America

items.title: Best Dividend Kings: October 2025
items.description: Dividend Kings are underperforming SPY in 2025, with a year-to-date return gap of 13.10%, but 12 Kings remain ahead of the index. Read more here.
